# Sandip Chintawar — Personal Blog

> Personal thoughts on building businesses, technology, and living a good life.

## About the Author
Sandip Chintawar is Co-Founder of Cymetrix Software, a Salesforce and Data/AI consulting firm based in Mumbai, India. He writes about entrepreneurship, data & AI, leadership, and personal reflections.

## Blog URL
https://sandipsblog.netlify.app

## RSS Feed
https://sandipsblog.netlify.app/feed.xml

## Topics Covered
- Entrepreneurship and building a consulting business
- Data, AI, and what's practically useful vs. hype
- Leadership and team building
- Personal growth, patience, and the long game
- Life in Mumbai, India
